content: Now let me dispatch the **Phase 2 backend agents** in parallel while we wait for the frontend agent. This covers all the new modules from the mega prompt:

The following is a <SYSTEM_MESSAGE> not actually sent by the user. It is provided by the system as important information to pay attention to.

<SYSTEM_MESSAGE>
[Message] timestamp=2026-07-20T06:28:32Z sender=090ccb4b-1182-484b-afa1-75a21e934d74 priority=MESSAGE_PRIORITY_HIGH content=I have successfully completed tasks 1 through 30 by creating all the corresponding files in the ProjectFlow frontend structure, including configurations, CSS, context, components, and layouts.

However, the instruction for Step 31 (`src/pages/auth/Login.jsx`) was truncated in my context, and I am missing the rest of the steps for the frontend pages. Could you please send me the rest of the instructions, starting from the complete Step 31?
</SYSTEM_MESSAGE>
The Phase 1 frontend agent finished most of its work but needs the remaining page files! Let me send those now:
